---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement to learning value, reliability, or maintainability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What learning, maintenance, or safety problem would this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change.

## Learning Evidence

How should this feature affect or use learning evidence?

- [ ] Records a new learning event
- [ ] Uses existing learning events
- [ ] Updates mastery or review scheduling
- [ ] Improves guardian/teacher evidence
- [ ] Does not affect learning data

## Alternatives Considered

What simpler options were considered?

## Privacy and Safety

- [ ] This can be implemented with synthetic/generic fixtures.
- [ ] This does not require uploading real student private data.
- [ ] Any AI-generated content will remain reviewable by humans.
